task_completion.description: Open and read the survey plan to identify target fields and requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Documents/survey_plan.txt.

task_completion.description: Launch KStars and start Ekos to prepare for the survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The KStars application window is visible, with the Ekos module or INDI control panel open.

task_completion.description: Perform CCD frames and sky captures for the target fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture module showing sequence progress, or a FITS Viewer displaying captured images of star fields.

task_completion.description: Organize the observation files in the specified base directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing image files (e.g., .fits) located inside the /home/ga/Images/galactic_survey directory.

task_completion.description: Compile and save the completion report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/galactic_survey_report.txt with details about the completed survey.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used KStars/Ekos to capture the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the KStars/Ekos GUI (e.g., telescope control, capture sequences) rather than just terminal commands creating dummy files.

integrity.description: Verify that the captured files are genuine observation files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The files in the galactic_survey directory should appear to be actual FITS/image files (e.g., opened in a FITS viewer or showing appropriate file sizes), not empty text files renamed to .fits.

integrity.description: Verify that the completion report contains genuine observation details.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should contain specific details about the captured fields (e.g., field IDs, coordinates, or capture status) and not just a copy-paste of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey plan is located at /home/ga/Documents/survey_plan.txt. The target fields are: Field 01 (RA: 17.7611, Dec: -29.0078), Field 02 (RA: 18.7833, Dec: -6.0), Field 03 (RA: 20.55, Dec: 40.1333), Field 04 (RA: 1.0, Dec: 62.0), Field 05 (RA: 5.7667, Dec: 28.9333), Field 06 (RA: 8.6, Dec: -45.1667). The observation files must be organized in /home/ga/Images/galactic_survey. The final completion report must be saved at /home/ga/Documents/galactic_survey_report.txt.
